violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloth found on counter in kitchen.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Exhaust hood does not extend 6" beyond all cooking surfaces, does not have automatic fire suppression.
Handwashing lavatories. — --- Coffee bar handwash sink has filtered water - May not use.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
